scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/proxy-engine && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/extension-runtime && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/web-ui && npm run build:ts && node build-ts/build.mjs
scripts.build:ts: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json
scripts.dev: npm link @switchyagain/extension-runtime && npm link @switchyagain/web-ui && npm link @switchyagain/proxy-engine
scripts.release: node ../../scripts/generate-browser-entrypoints.mjs --check && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/proxy-engine && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/extension-runtime && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/web-ui && npm run build:ts && node build-ts/build.mjs release
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json --noEmit
